who: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using Greenhouse for hiring
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in productivity. We streamline the onboarding process instead of manual onboarding processes and email updates.
problem: Inefficient onboarding process for new hires
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar onboarding challenges
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools sharing
try_it: Let users try Email notifications for HR updates and Manual invoice entry form on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the onboarding process
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant HR communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing employee data
Allow one-click export of onboarding reports
Reduce steps required in the onboarding process
